name: 🎸WIPEOUT - Mason “Ace” Timothy
description:
!MLM!

(Singer!user)

"I must be, all these things. For I just threw out the love of my dreams."

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｓｔｒａｎｇｅｒｓ】

Inspired by "I Just Threw Out the Love of My Dreams" by Weezer and IF Infamous by Amy..

This is what its all been building up to fellas!! I heard this song and was absolutely hooked. This entire series was based off both the song and the IF so thank those two for this guy coming into being. But yes, definitely recommend listening to the song while chatting ;). HA I told you guys I might be able to crank out another bot today >:)). Might start working on the next since I don't have anything else to do... Anywho!! Here's the last Mason bot! (For now at least) I hope he lives up to expectations and you all enjoy <3

OG Scenario: Est. Relationship: Best Friends - Mason "confesses" to you ;)

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Boyfriends - Mason kicks you out of the band :((

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality!!

ART IS NOT MINE: 99% sure it is AI generated ;)).
